title: Section 52
content: Every designated consumer or manufacturer of equipment or appliance 1 [or any other person or entity covered under this Act shall furnish to the Bureau such information, documents or records relating to energy consumption, and such samples] of any material or substance used in relation to any equipment or appliance, as the Bureau may require
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 19 of 2022, s. 15, for the words, brackets, letter and figures "specified under clause (b) of section 14 shall supply the Bureau with such information, and with such samples" (w.e.f. 1-1-2023).
